payload.value:
Follow-up cleanup from the code review of the ticket-search feature (FTS5 backend + web palette + iOS `.searchable`). **All 15 findings fixed** — see commit on this branch. Verified: 90 backend tests pass, iOS builds clean (0 warnings), live CLI search smoke OK.

## Correctness

- [x] **iOS — stale results on workspace switch.** Added `.onChange(of: workspace?.id)` in `BoardView` that clears `searchText`/`searchResults`/`isSearching`.
- [x] **Web — ⌘K/Ctrl-K wiped an open non-search modal.** `bindSearchShortcuts` now bails when any `.modal-backdrop` is open (matches the `/` shortcut).
- [x] **Backend — prefix bleed broke exact key/number lookup.** `searchTickets` now floats an exact `KEY-N`/number hit (`exactTicketRef`, case-insensitive) to the top while keeping prefix siblings.
- [x] **iOS — `AppStore.search` swallowed every error.** Now surfaces real failures via `error`; only `CancellationError`/`URLError.cancelled` stay silent.
- [x] **Search results went stale vs live updates.** Web: `scheduleRefresh` re-runs the open palette's query on SSE; `choose` awaits+catches `openDrawer` (404 → toast). iOS: `.onChange(of: store.tickets)` reconciles results (drops deleted, refreshes fields).
- [x] **iOS — first-keystroke "No Results" flash.** `runSearch` sets `isSearching` before the debounce sleep.
- [x] **Backend — non-ASCII tokens silently matched nothing.** `buildFtsMatch` regex narrowed to `[\p{L}0-9]+`, mirroring what `unicode61` indexes.
- [x] **iOS — slow stale response could overwrite newer.** `runSearch` now guards `q == trimmedSearch` before publishing.

## Robustness / efficiency

- [x] **`tickets_fts_au` over-reindexed.** Added a `WHEN` clause so it fires only when an indexed text column actually changes; triggers are now dropped+recreated each open so the new body reaches older DBs.
- [x] **Silent truncation at 50.** Web shows a "first 50 — refine" footer; iOS shows the same when `searchResults.count >= 50`.
- [x] **`ensureSearchIndex` only repaired a fully-empty index.** Now rebuilds whenever `tickets_fts` count ≠ `tickets` count (self-heals partial/stale indexes).
- [x] **Web `searchSeq`/`searchDebounce` were module-global.** Moved inside `openSearchModal` (per-palette); live-refresh hook cleared on open/close.

## Cleanup / duplication

- [x] **`searchRowHtml` duplicated `renderCard` + omitted the PR chip.** Added the PR chip so search matches the board.
- [x] **iOS `SearchResultRow`/`CardView` badge duplication + CSS `.search-pri` vs `.card-pri`.** Extracted a shared `TicketBadges` SwiftUI view used by both; merged the priority-color CSS rules.
- [x] **`limit` edge handling.** `clampSearchLimit` handles arrays and clamps 0/negative up to 1 (per the documented 1-200); the `limit:0` test was updated to expect 1, plus array/undefined cases added.

---

Out of scope (separate graph/test work, file their own tickets if desired):
- `AppStore.loadRelationEdges` captures the non-Sendable `HubClient` into `withTaskGroup` `@Sendable` tasks — Swift-6 strict-concurrency violation.
- `test/helpers.js` `startTestServer().close()` leaks the `mgr.attach()` `fs.watch` watcher (pre-existing teardown asymmetry).
